question: RQ2
summary: Warm CLI process overhead measured under 50ms p95 on this host, fitting 3s hook ceilings; cold spawn is disallowed on prompt-time hooks by D4 timeout/spawn-policy semantics.

question: RQ4
summary: Default socket path is too long on macOS, but existing Codex/OpenCode config pins /tmp/mk-spec-memory and bridge code supports tcp://; D6 makes the CLI shim enforce this by default.
Add --timeout-ms and warm-only/spawn-policy behavior; exit 75 for transient timeout and return stale/no-op cached context from prompt-time hooks instead of cold-spawning.
Default CLI shim socket directory to /tmp/mk-spec-memory when unset, respect overrides, and reject too-long Unix socket paths on Darwin or require explicit TCP fallback.
